parameters.query:
INSERT INTO majordhome.sms_logs (org_id, client_id, intervention_id, phone_to, message, campaign_name, channel, status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.org_id }}',
  '{{ $json.client_id }}',
  '{{ $json.intervention_id }}',
  '{{ $json.phone_formatted }}',
  '{{ $json.whatsapp_body }}',
  'avis_j1',
  'whatsapp',
  'pending'
)
RETURNING id;

UPDATE majordhome.sms_logs
SET status = 'sent',
    channel = 'whatsapp',
    provider_sid = '{{ $('Envoyer WhatsApp').item.json.sid }}',
    sent_at = now()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Injecter lien tracking').item.json.log_id }}';

UPDATE majordhome.sms_logs
SET status = 'sent',
    channel = 'sms',
    message = '{{ $('Injecter lien tracking').item.json.sms_body }}',
    provider_sid = '{{ $json.sid || "" }}',
    sent_at = now()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Injecter lien tracking').item.json.log_id }}';
